Name: Groq (GroqCloud)
FreeTierSummary: No credit card required. Free tier gives you real, usable rate limits on fast LPU-hosted inference - the most generous no-cost option for actually running an agent day to day.
Models: Llama 3.1/3.3, Qwen, Gemma, Kimi K2, Whisper (speech-to-text)
RateLimit: Varies by model, e.g. Llama 3.1 8B Instant: 30 req/min, 6K tokens/min, 14.4K req/day
HowToUse: OpenAI-compatible endpoint - set base URL to https://api.groq.com/openai/v1 and use your Groq API key wherever an agent tool asks for an OpenAI-style key/base URL.

Name: Google AI Studio (Gemini API)
FreeTierSummary: Free tier with no credit card needed to start, rate-limited by requests/tokens per minute and per day - generous enough for personal projects and agent experimentation.
Models: Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite (fastest/cheapest), Gemini 2.0 Flash
RateLimit: Varies by model and tier - check the live limits page, since Google tunes these often
HowToUse: Native Gemini API key works directly with Google's own SDKs. Google also publishes an OpenAI-compatibility endpoint (https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai/) for tools that expect an OpenAI-style client.

Name: OpenRouter
FreeTierSummary: Aggregates dozens of providers behind one API - any model ID ending in ":free" costs nothing. Rate limits are shared across your account, not per-model.
Models: Rotating selection of free-tagged models - Llama, DeepSeek, Gemini Flash, Mistral, and others (check openrouter.ai/models?max_price=0 for the current list, since which models are free changes)
RateLimit: 20 req/min; 50 req/day (under $10 lifetime spend) or 1,000 req/day (once you've topped up $10+, even if you don't spend it on paid models)
HowToUse: Fully OpenAI-compatible - set base URL to https://openrouter.ai/api/v1 and pick a ":free" model ID.

Name: Cerebras Inference
FreeTierSummary: Free tier on Cerebras's wafer-scale inference hardware - known for very high tokens/sec throughput, useful for latency-sensitive agent loops.
RateLimit: Per-model requests/tokens per minute - check the live docs for current numbers
HowToUse: OpenAI-compatible endpoint - set base URL to https://api.cerebras.ai/v1.

Name: Hugging Face Inference Providers
FreeTierSummary: A free HF account includes a small monthly credit pool for routed inference across many hosted providers/models - useful for trying a wide variety of open models without hosting them yourself.
Models: Thousands of open models across text, image, audio, and embedding tasks
RateLimit: Monthly credit allowance on the free plan (small, resets monthly) - upgrade for more
HowToUse: Some routed providers expose an OpenAI-compatible chat endpoint under https://router.huggingface.co/v1 - check the specific model's page for the exact call format.

Name: Cloudflare Workers AI
FreeTierSummary: A daily free allowance (measured in "Neurons") is included with any Cloudflare account, no separate signup needed if you already have one.
Models: Llama, Mistral, Whisper, embeddings, and other open models Cloudflare hosts
RateLimit: Daily Neuron allowance shared across all Workers AI calls on your account
HowToUse: Cloudflare's own REST API (not natively OpenAI-shaped); some community OpenAI-compatible proxies exist, or call it directly as a tool/function from an agent.

Name: GitHub Models
FreeTierSummary: Free (rate-limited) access to a marketplace of hosted models for anyone with a GitHub account - built for prototyping, not production traffic.
Models: OpenAI GPT family, Meta Llama, Mistral, Cohere, and others via one marketplace
RateLimit: Rate-limited per model/org tier - lowest of any option here, meant for quick experiments
HowToUse: OpenAI-compatible endpoint via Azure AI Inference - use your GitHub personal access token as the API key.

Name: Mistral La Plateforme
FreeTierSummary: An "Experiment" free tier for trying Mistral's own models with rate limits, no card required to start.
RateLimit: Requests-per-second and tokens-per-minute caps on the free tier - check current docs
HowToUse: OpenAI-compatible-ish REST API (Mistral's official SDKs are closest fit); base URL https://api.mistral.ai/v1.

Name: NVIDIA NIM (build.nvidia.com)
FreeTierSummary: Free API credits (not perpetual) to try NVIDIA-hosted NIM microservices across a large model catalog - good for evaluating a model before self-hosting it.
Models: Llama, Mistral, NVIDIA's own models, plus many open-weight releases
RateLimit: Credit-based rather than a recurring free quota - runs out, doesn't renew automatically

Name: Cohere
FreeTierSummary: A free trial API key with rate limits, explicitly for evaluation/development - Cohere's terms prohibit production use on the trial key.
Models: Command R / Command R+, Embed, Rerank
RateLimit: Low requests-per-minute cap on the trial key
HowToUse: Cohere's own SDK/REST shape (not OpenAI-compatible) - fine for testing, check docs before wiring into a production agent.

Name: SambaNova Cloud
FreeTierSummary: A free tier for fast inference on open models, similar positioning to Groq/Cerebras (custom inference hardware, not GPUs).
RateLimit: Per-model requests/tokens per minute - check current docs

Name: Together.ai
FreeTierSummary: Starting free credits on signup (time/usage-limited, not a perpetual free tier) plus a small rotating set of always-free models.
Models: Llama, Mistral, Qwen, DeepSeek, and a large open-model catalog
RateLimit: Credit-based for most models; a few tagged "free" models have their own rate limits
